subject: [PATCH v2 20/28] nfsd: add helper to marshal a fattr4 from completed args

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a new helper function `nfsd4_encode_attr_vals` to the NFSv4 server code, which encodes attribute values from a completed arguments structure into an XDR stream. The function breaks out the encoding of attribute values into its own separate function, making the code more modular and easier to maintain. This change is part of a larger series of patches that aim to improve the performance and reliability of the NFSv4 server.
